name: stitch-bridge
description: Skill-first Codex plugin for Stitch design ingestion, artifact download, interpretation, and frontend implementation.

interface.shortDescription: Generate, hydrate, interpret, implement, and review Stitch passes faithfully.
interface.longDescription: A self-contained Codex plugin that bundles Stitch MCP access, Stitch SDK artifact download support, and a small set of specialized skills for generating design passes, interpreting approved Stitch artifacts, implementing frontend apps, and reviewing code-to-design fidelity.
defaultPrompt: Generate a Stitch design pass for this product brief.
Interpret this approved Stitch pass before implementing the app.
Implement this Stitch design in Nuxt with high visual fidelity.
Review this implementation against the approved Stitch pass.
